# Milestone Review Template

## Overview
Use this template to conduct formal milestone reviews (phase gates, quality gates, go/no-go
reviews) and validate readiness to proceed.

**Purpose:** Evaluate deliverables, performance, risks, and decision readiness.

**Audience:** Project Manager, Steering Committee, Quality Assurance, Key Stakeholders.

---

| --- | --- |
| Milestone name |  |
| Project name |  |
| Review date |  |
| Review type | Phase Gate / Quality Gate / Go-No-Go / Checkpoint |
| Planned date |  |
| Actual date |  |
| Review lead |  |
| Participants |  |
